author: Uday Bhatia
name: LeakyReLU² + TrigramHashEmbedding
blurb: LeakyReLU(0.5)² activation + novel hash-based trigram embedding (2048×48) on PR #414 stack. 11L 512d 8H 4KV GQA, Partial RoPE 16/64, XSA last 4, EMA+SWA, GPTQ-lite int6+lzma, sliding eval stride 64. Validated on 1×H100 NVL with proportional wallclock (4054s ≈ 600s × 6.76).
